summary: candidate-handover EXP for extracting a reusable paragraph-level writing template from a published journal article after a deep-reading gate, without copying its content.

context.task_family: turn a real journal-style article into a structural writing template

scope_limits: This EXP extracts writing structure from published sample PDFs, not visual formatting.
Do not copy article content into the generated template.
Treat each journal, supervisor preference, and article genre as context-specific.
Current handover confidence applies to AAAJ-style systematic literature review articles; Barry review is still required before marking stable.
